mapper.select:
SELECT C.ROOM_ID AS roomId, C.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, C.SELLER_EMAIL AS sellerEmail, C.BUYER_EMAIL AS buyerEmail, C.LAST_MESSAGE AS lastMessage, TO_CHAR(C.LAST_MESSAGE_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS lastMessageAt, C.MUTE_YN AS muteYn, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, P.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, P.TRADE_METHOD AS tradeMethod, P.SALE_TYPE AS saleType, P.RESERVED_ROOM_ID AS reservedRoomId, (SELECT IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE PI WHERE PI.PRODUCT_NO = C.PRODUCT_NO AND PI.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS productImgUrl, CASE WHEN C.SELLER_EMAIL = #{loginUserEmail} THEN C.BUYER_EMAIL ELSE C.SELLER_EMAIL END AS otherUserEmail,
(SELECT NICKNAME FROM MEMBER M WHERE M.EMAIL = ( CASE WHEN C.SELLER_EMAIL = #{loginUserEmail} THEN C.BUYER_EMAIL ELSE C.SELLER_EMAIL END )) AS nickname, (SELECT T.PAY_STATUS FROM TRANSACTIONS T WHERE T.ROOM_ID = C.ROOM_ID AND T.BUYER_EMAIL = #{loginUserEmail} AND T.PAY_STATUS = 'DONE' AND (T.TRADE_STATUS IS NULL OR T.TRADE_STATUS != '거래완료') AND ROWNUM = 1) AS payStatus, (SELECT T.TRANSACTION_ID FROM TRANSACTIONS T WHERE T.ROOM_ID = C.ROOM_ID AND T.BUYER_EMAIL = #{loginUserEmail} AND T.PAY_STATUS = 'DONE' AND (T.TRADE_STATUS IS NULL OR T.TRADE_STATUS != '거래완료') AND ROWNUM = 1) AS transactionId FROM CHAT_ROOM C JOIN PRODUCTS P ON C.PRODUCT_NO = P.PRODUCT_NO WHERE C.SELLER_EMAIL = #{loginUserEmail} OR C.BUYER_EMAIL = #{loginUserEmail} ORDER BY C.LAST_MESSAGE_AT DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, P.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, P.TRADE_METHOD AS tradeMethod, P.SALE_TYPE AS saleType, P.RESERVED_ROOM_ID AS reservedRoomId, (SELECT IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE PI WHERE PI.PRODUCT_NO = P.PRODUCT_NO AND PI.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS productImgUrl, M.NICKNAME AS nickname FROM PRODUCTS P JOIN MEMBER M ON M.EMAIL = #{sellerEmail} WHERE P.PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORTS WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId}
SELECT PRODUCT_NO FROM CHAT_ROOM WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId}
mapper.update: UPDATE PRODUCTS SET TRADE_STATUS = '판매중', RESERVED_ROOM_ID = NULL WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
UPDATE PRODUCTS SET TRADE_STATUS = '판매완료', RESERVED_ROOM_ID = NULL WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRANSACTIONS ( TRANSACTION_ID, PRODUCT_NO, SELLER_EMAIL, BUYER_EMAIL, PAYMENT_TYPE, AMOUNT, TRADE_STATUS, PAY_STATUS, COMPLETE_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_TRANSACTION_ID.NEXTVAL, #{productNo}, #{sellerEmail}, #{buyerEmail}, #{paymentType}, #{amount}, '거래완료', 'DONE', SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE CHAT_ROOM SET SELLER_UNREAD = NVL(SELLER_UNREAD, 0) + 1 WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId}
UPDATE CHAT_ROOM SET BUYER_UNREAD = NVL(BUYER_UNREAD, 0) + 1 WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId}

UPDATE CHAT_ROOM SET SELLER_UNREAD = CASE WHEN SELLER_EMAIL = #{email} THEN 0 ELSE SELLER_UNREAD END, BUYER_UNREAD = CASE WHEN BUYER_EMAIL = #{email} THEN 0 ELSE BUYER_UNREAD END WHERE SELLER_EMAIL = #{email} OR BUYER_EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN SELLER_EMAIL = #{email} THEN NVL(SELLER_UNREAD, 0) WHEN BUYER_EMAIL = #{email} THEN NVL(BUYER_UNREAD, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 0) FROM CHAT_ROOM WHERE SELLER_EMAIL = #{email} OR BUYER_EMAIL = #{email}
